extraction.one_line_summary: BOZZANA Filippo won from breakaway on home roads in Veneto, ROGLIC Primoz attacked to move into second overall, THOMAS Geraint matched him, ALMEIDA Joao dropped to third
tactical_patterns: ROGLIC Primoz attacked final climb while ALMEIDA Joao needed VINE Jay pacing support, revealing strength differential between second-place rivals
INEOS controlled valley before final three climbs, allowing breakaway six minutes but attacking third-from-last climb to isolate rivals early
Israel Premier Tech animated race with PINO Andrea and ZANA Filippo but lacked cohesion when GEE Derek and FRIGO Marco forced to chase separately
VINE Jay descent mistake cost ALMEIDA Joao critical seconds, demonstrating support rider errors decisive in tight GC battles with seconds separating podium

rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: attacked final climb after speculation about weakness, gained 28 seconds on Almeida to move into second overall
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: negative: required VINE Jay pacing support on final climb, dropped from second to third, lost 28 seconds through support rider descent error
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: rode isolated from teammates on final climbs yet never lost contact with Roglic attacks, defending pink at 37 years old
rider_signals.DUNBAR Eddie: positive: moved up GC despite losing time to leaders, suggesting weak competition below top five positions
rider_signals.BOZZANA Filippo: positive: won sprint from breakaway on home Veneto roads in Italian champion jersey after breakaway gained nearly six minutes
rider_signals.PINO Andrea: negative: second sprint finish loss in three days from breakaway, lacks finishing power despite making successful selections
rider_signals.HEALY Ben: negative: attacked at race start then immediately dropped, lost blue jersey to TIBOPINO after full gas opening on flat Veneto roads
